title: How to Use NanoClaw (Better Than OpenClaw?)
summary: NanoClaw is a lightweight, AI-native alternative to OpenClaw designed for building agent swarms with ephemeral Docker containers. The framework prioritizes simplicity and AI-driven customization over monolithic code, enabling developers to quickly set up agents that coordinate via Telegram and execute complex pipelines like data scraping and analysis.
